scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: CollectStatusEvent fires after every hook, add_status() usage, collect_unit_status vs collect_app_status, framework picks highest priority, cannot use ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus. Minor omission: priority order listed as Blocked > Maintenance > Waiting > Active, missing 'error' at the top (though it correctly notes ErrorStatus cannot be passed to add_status).
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order stated as 'Blocked > Maintenance > Waiting > Active' which omits 'error' from the priority list. The gold standard states error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active. Since ErrorStatus can't be passed to add_status(), this omission is minor but technically incomplete rather than fabricated. No invented APIs or parameters.
